description: Urban chic has a new extension of its style, with this handbag from lino perros. Style and practicality combine in this stylish handbag, which you can pair with casual and formal ensembles. Height: 31 cmWidth: 42 cmDepth: 11 cm Made of leatherette for durability and style Two short handles for carrying ease and style One main zippered compartment with two inner zippered compartments, mobile and organiser pouches. One zippered compartment on the back Metal embellishments and buckles for enhanced style Twill tape design on the front with a shimmer finish Branded zippers Brand badge on the front Bag care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
